data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin, XRP prices drop after $2.7 billion BTC sale. BTC fell from $114,000 to $110,000. ETH hits high $4,715.63. Market loses $562 million in last 12 hours.
data.description: On Sunday, leading cryptocurrencies experienced a decline following a massive billion-dollar Bitcoin sale that led to a flash crash. Bitcoin saw a 2.18% decrease, trading at $112,839.95. Ethereum dropped 1.34% to $4,715.63, XRP fell 1.84% to $2.99, Solana decreased by 1.05% to $203.80, and Dogecoin saw a 4.05% decline to $0.2278. The flash crash occurred when a whale liquidated 24,000 BTC valued at over $2.7 billion, causing Bitcoin to fall from $114,000 to $110,000 in minutes. This move led to the market losing over $562 million in the last 12 hours. The whale still holds 152,874 BTC across various addresses and continues to sell, contributing to the price drop.

data.title: Metabora Games & Baligames present 'Puzzle & Guardians' at 'WebX 2025', introducing new genre; launch teaser for BORA DEEPS brand.
data.description: The primary collaborator of LINE NEXT and the Kaia DLT Foundation has introduced the "Mini Dapp Station" at a prominent Web3 conference in Japan. They have revealed a unique concept merging casual match-3 puzzles with RPG growth elements. Additionally, they have launched a teaser page for their latest product line "BORA DEEPS" to enhance user interaction.

data.title: SBI Group & Chainlink partner to accelerate institutional digital asset adoption in key markets, starting with Japan.
data.description: SBI Group, a major Japanese financial conglomerate, has announced a partnership with Chainlink to facilitate the utilization of tokenized real-world assets, tokenized funds, and regulated stablecoins. The collaboration will initially target the Japanese market. The announcement was made in Tokyo on August 24, 2025. SBI Group, known as one of Japan's largest financial firms with assets worth over USD [insert number here], aims to leverage Chainlink's technology for various use cases in the realm of digital assets.

data.title: Willis boosts growth in Japan by expanding team and entering specialty lines to meet rising demand.
data.description: On August 24, 2025, Willis, a subsidiary of WTW business (NASDAQ: WTW), revealed a notable enhancement of its Japanese Corporate Risk & Broking team, showcasing a reinvigorated dedication to the rapidly changing Japanese market. This team expansion enriches Willis’ capacity to address the increasing needs of businesses in Japan by augmenting its proficiency in various industries. It aims to offer valuable insights, data, and analytics to facilitate more informed insurance transactions and comprehensive risk management for its clients, reflecting a strategic move to better serve the market demands.

data.title: LayerZero emerges victorious in a four-way bidding war for Stargate, securing a $110 million acquisition.
data.description: The Stargate cross-blockchain platform community has approved LayerZero’s acquisition for $110 million, rejecting bids from three other competitors.

data.title: Philippines may establish 20-year Bitcoin reserve held by central bank, as per proposed bill.
data.description: A new bill has been introduced outlining conditions under which the nation's central bank could potentially purchase Bitcoin and secure the assets for a period of twenty years.
